name: noble_giver_smoke
description: Noble encounter START/TEARDOWN wiring smoke at two giver sites - NEVER fights the boss. Leg 1: the Mew chase giver 'A Giggle in the Grass' at the Oasis NE bank (giver 1788.5/114/4212.5, arena center [1780,114,4220] 11b away - chase-type body is IsInvulnerable and never attacks, so this leg is intrinsically safe). Leg 2: the Kyogre monument buoy 'Warning Buoy' on the Mystic Island shore (234.5/65/2347.5, 12b west of arena center [246,66,2347] - the alpha.5 monument-to-arena desync fix IS the regression surface here; a buoy still at the old Gullwing pier makes find_npc fail loudly). Each leg: talk, assert the offer entry renders, click the noble-start button, wait the overture (start title + the Java retreat line 'Retreat any time with' - needle chosen INSIDE one color run and common to BOTH lethalNobleFights variants), assert the phase-1 body manifested by its unique tag, then /noble-abort and assert clean teardown: the withdraw line, the dread-beat overlay 'It watches you go', body swept (covers the bodyUuid-null discovery-failure sweep - abort can land inside the 4s intro), and a second /noble-abort returning 'You have no active noble encounter' as the session-empty probe (fake-sky restore is per-player packets, not assertable headless). KYOGRE SAFETY: lethalNobleFights defaults TRUE and kyogre's attacks do 5-8 dmg to the hardcore driver, so the leg wears Resistance V + Regen and aborts within the ~4s intro window (first attack cooldowns are >=70 ticks past the REALTIME flip - the belt to the resistance braces). Dialog gates are band tags: default entries need badges_gte_3 + defeated_noble_<id>_lte_0 (recognition:mid compiles to the LOWER bound only; the storyFlag is a SCOREBOARD mirrored by dialog/band_tags, quest/render backfills unset to 0) - the preamble sets memory_fragment=3 and adds the tags instantly so we never race the band tick (mystic_mirror precedent). Cleanup restores memory_fragment=0 (wheat_war_first_farm assumes badges<3); defeated_noble_* ride at 0 = the fresh-player natural state.
_probe_notes: Mew Oasis giver spot only: the alpha.4 relocation commit claims 'All probed for solid footing' for the NE bank (RCON probe), but no live player stand-test is on record for THIS coord (the y89 Safari clearing verification predates the Oasis move and no longer applies). Kyogre buoy 234.5 65 2347.5 is deliberately NOT listed: alpha.5 authored it on probed-solid Mystic Island shore (surface y65) and the fix wave was live-verified 18/18 on the headless server.

steps.comment: -- SITE + DESIGN NOTES: both givers are latch-placed (ambient/place/noble_giver_mew_wisp + noble_monument_kyogre import at the tp coords; latch fires within 40b if this world has not spawned them yet - the settle sleep covers it). Buttons run 'noble start <id>' ExecAsUser (perm elevation engine-verified). NO BATTLE, NO PHASE-2: we abort in phase 1, so the TBCS/showdown stall family is never exposed and no autobattle/garchomp/funding preamble is needed (no fees or shops touched either). --
-- leftover-dialog guard: scenario contract, close anything a prior run left open --

-- global preamble (player-bound state, chunk-independent - entity ops wait until after each leg's tp): open the mid-band dialog gate and zero both storyFlag scoreboards; tags added/removed INSTANTLY alongside their scores so we do not race the band tick --

steps.comment_: clear any session a crashed run left in the manager map ('You have no active noble encounter' on clean runs is fine); a stray BODY in unloaded chunks survives this - swept by tag after each leg's tp, per the tp-before-kill rule

steps.comment: -- LEG 1: MEW (chase giver, Oasis NE bank). tp BEFORE any kill (kill silently no-ops in unloaded chunks). Wilderness site - full mob spawns; day + hostile sweep + armor effects keep the hardcore driver honest even though the chase body itself never attacks. --

steps.comment_: safari_yards' hostile sweep, positioned at the player (a bare console kill measures distance from world spawn, not the site)
stray phase-1 body from an aborted run - loaded now that we stand at the arena; /kill's GENERIC_KILL bypasses the chase body's IsInvulnerable
band tick settles the tag lane + the latch places the giver on a first visit

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the wisp's offer entry (prio 10) - prose any-of covers both rotating say lines, the button is the stable assert --

expect_screen_text: Hee. Something pink and impossible flits where the tall grass hides it. It will not stand and fight - it will run, and blink, and giggle. Touch it enough times and it tires itself silly, and then it is yours if you are gentle.
You felt that too, did you. It wants to play, not to fight. Chase it, corner it, be kind - and mind the keep up north where the sky has a temper, for that is no game at all.

steps.comment: -- beat 2: start the chase - overture = start title + the retreat system line, then the body manifests at the arena center 11b away --
-- beat 3: withdraw - abort line, dread-beat overlay, body swept, session empty --

steps.wait_chat: You have no active noble encounter

steps.comment: -- LEG 2: KYOGRE (monument buoy, Mystic Island shore). Same shape; abort stays inside the ~4s intro so no attack ever fires (and Resistance V holds if timing slips). tp BEFORE the kills, again. --

steps.comment_: refresh - this is the leg the armor exists for (lethalNobleFights defaults true)

expect_screen_text: A lantern buoy, chained to the seabed. The log bolted to its side reads: WARNING - the sea seems violent in these parts. Below that, in a harbourmaster hand that no longer draws Company pay: it surfaces for those who ask. Ring the bell only if you mean it.
The chain groans against something enormous down there, patient as a debt. Ring the buoy bell and it will rise - do not ring it unless you are ready for the deep.

steps.expect_screen_text: Ring the bell - call the deep

steps.comment: -- beat 5: ring the bell - then move FAST (no settle sleep before the body assert; the two wait_chats already span the spawn tick) --
-- beat 6: withdraw inside the intro - identical teardown contract --

steps.wait_chat: You have no active noble encounter

steps.comment: -- cleanup: badge band back under 3 (score + tag together, no band-tick race); defeated_noble_* stay 0 = natural fresh-player state (band tick keeps the lte_0 mirrors); effect clear drops the noble armor and the dread-beat darkness --
